plugins.name: nation-of-elites
plugins.description: A complete 74-agent AI workforce organized like a real IT company, aligned with Claude Opus 4.8 (adaptive thinking, high default effort, dynamic workflows, task budgets). 12 divisions including executive leadership, strategic planning, engineering, QA, SecOps, AI/ML, mobile, construction AI, content & localization, and business development. Persistent memory, skills preloading, official plugin integrations, and Agent Teams support.
